meanings.definition: badminton played with two players on each side
tennis played with two players on each side
a base hit on which the batter stops safely at second base
examples: he hit a double to deep centerfield

meanings.definition: a stand-in for movie stars to perform dangerous stunts
examples: his first job in Hollywood was as a double for Clark Gable

meanings.definition: someone who closely resembles a famous person (especially an actor)
examples: she's the very image of her mother

meanings.definition: a quantity that is twice as great as another
raising the stakes in a card game by a factor of 2
examples: I decided his double was a bluff

meanings.definition: bend over or curl up, usually with laughter or pain
do double duty; serve two purposes or have two functions
examples: She doubles as his wife and secretary

meanings.definition: bridge: make a demand for (a card or suit)
make or do or perform again
examples: He could never replicate his brilliant performance of the magic trick
